name: Asheesh Vishwakarma
hero_desc: Crafting robust web applications with clean code and seamless UX. Specializing in full-stack PHP development, API integrations, and scalable CRM/ERP systems.
about_p1: I'm a PHP Developer based in Airoli, Navi Mumbai, with 3+ years of professional experience at I Resolve Services Pvt Ltd. I build scalable web applications using Laravel and CodeIgniter 4.
about_p2: From multi-company CRM systems to full eCommerce platforms and ERP solutions — I deliver end-to-end products that solve real business problems, with third-party API integrations, payment gateways, and mobile APIs.
